# Vijay Panwar

> Senior Product Manager · AI/ML Product Leader · Payments & Fintech

## Contact & Availability

- **Location:** Mumbai, India
- **Open to:** Remote roles & new opportunities
- **Email:** vijaypanwar333@gmail.com
- **Phone:** 8871553657
- **LinkedIn:** https://linkedin.com/in/vijay-panwar-835bb13a
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/Voldy75

## Professional Summary

Product leader with 8+ years scaling consumer-facing and business-facing platforms to millions of users. Expert in 0-to-1 product development and growth optimization, with proven track record of driving user engagement through data-driven experimentation. Specialized in building AI/ML-powered products and cross-platform experiences in high-growth environments.

## Core Competencies

- **Product Strategy:** Define scaled vision & strategy, Product Roadmap Development, Multi-language Product Development, User Research & Behavioral Analysis, Monetization and Revenue Optimization
- **Technical & AI:** AI/ML Product Development, API Strategy & Integration, Platform Scaling Architecture, Workflow Automation, Agentic AI Systems, Multi-agent orchestration, RAG pipelines, LLM Observability (LangSmith)
- **Growth & Engagement:** 0-to-1 Product Development, User Acquisition & Retention Strategy, A/B Testing & Experimentation, Data-Driven Decision Making, Product-Led Growth (PLG), Go-to-market execution
- **User Experience:** Customer-Centric approach & Innovation, Cross-Platform Experience Design, Accessibility and Inclusion
- **Industry:** Payment Systems, Merchant acquiring, Payment Infrastructure, Regulatory compliance & risk management, SaaS, IaaS

## Work Experience

### Zrika (NexNebula Technologies) — Senior Product Manager | Mumbai | Dec 2024 – Present
Architecting an AI-powered payment infrastructure-as-a-service solution.
- Defined product vision and multi-year roadmaps for AI-driven payment infrastructure. Leading a distributed team of 10+ across engineering & product.
- Shipped internal AI copilots with data guardrails for Compliance & HR using RAG architecture + LLM models and observability & monitoring platforms.
- Engineering an AI-powered fraud & risk management (FRM) inference engine to reduce chargebacks, onboarding, and transactional fraud.
- Built an enterprise-grade UPI payment switch from ground up — sub-50ms latency, multi-tenant fraud engine, NPCI-compliant routing & settlement.

### NPCI (BHIM) — Senior Product Manager, BHIM | Mumbai | Dec 2023 – Nov 2024
Led UPI Lite product strategy for world's largest digital payment ecosystem (350M+ users), driving 4x adoption growth.
- Spearheaded 0-to-1 and 1-to-100 scaling of UPI Lite at BHIM.
- Drove user growth strategy for 30M+ consumer platform, achieving 30% DAU increase.
- Improved activation (+40%) and retention (+35%) through region-specific user journey mapping.
- Scaled UPI Lite payment infrastructure to 400K+ daily transactions with 99.9% uptime.
- Commanded data engineering team to build analytics on 10M+ data points.
- Launched UPI Lite Auto top-up and UPI-ICD (Interoperable Cash Deposit) from concept to market.
- Managed product roadmap with 15+ developers & cross-functional stakeholders.

### Rapipay Fintech — Product Manager, CICO | Noida | Feb 2022 – Sep 2023
- Automated merchant onboarding: 600+ users/day activated, onboarding time reduced by 60%, fraudulent transactions reduced by 45%.
- Developed cross-platform lending APIs processing ₹22 Cr+ monthly disbursements.
- Built address verification using reverse geocoding APIs to address location-based fraud.
- Developed API strategy enabling third-party integrations across insurance, remittance, and travel.
- Received company award for automated CRM tools increasing sales productivity by 50%.

### Burgon Technologies — Co-Founder & Head of Product & Engineering | Ratlam | Apr 2019 – Jan 2022
Built a martech platform for small businesses in Tier 4 & 5 markets.
- Developed culturally-relevant digital solutions for underserved regions.
- Built cost-efficient B2B advertising, driving 40% revenue growth.

### ICICI Bank Ltd — Deputy Manager | Ahmedabad | Feb 2015 – Oct 2018
- Increased customer activation rates by 35% through streamlined onboarding.

## Technical Skills

**Product Management:** Mixpanel, Excel, SQL Analytics, Financial Reporting Dashboards, User Segmentation, Funnel Optimization, Behavioral Analysis, JIRA, Confluence, Figma, Notion, Slack

**Development:** FastAPI, Supabase, VSCode, Github, Python (Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, PyTorch), SQL

**Financial Systems:** UPI, Digital Wallets, Payment Gateways, Real-time Settlements, Authorization, Routing, Orchestration, Merchant Management System, Digital Onboarding Platform, RESTful APIs, Webhook Integration, Multi-cloud Architecture (AWS, GCP), Microservices, Docker, OAuth, Observability, PCI-DSS, KYC/AML Automation, Data Encryption, Fraud & risk management

**AI/ML:** LangGraph, Claude Code, Cursor, Pinecone, Hugging Face, TensorFlow, Ollama, RAG pipelines, Vector databases, Embedding optimization, LLM Observability (LangSmith), Inference Optimization, Fine-tuning, Prompt engineering, Multi-agent orchestration, Agentic Workflow design, Tool-use & Function Calling, MCP (Model Context Protocol), Eval frameworks (RAGAS), Responsible AI, Guardrails, HITL systems

## Projects

### Local RAG System (github.com/Voldy75/localRAG)
Optimizes team productivity with LLMs & sensitive local data. Converts documents into vector embeddings and uses semantic search for contextual Q&A.

### Data Dashboard On-the-Go (github.com/Voldy75/insight-compass-reports)
Generates one-pager covering critical metrics from any uploaded dataset — no context setting required.

### Create, Shop & Crave (create-shop-crave.vercel.app)
AI-powered food assistant that understands cravings, suggests personalized recipes with instant grocery ordering, and recommends nearby restaurants.
